## Purpose

Track authority conflicts, ownership ambiguities, and decision-rights alignment in a repeatable governance format.

## Compliance And Privacy Guardrail

Do not include account numbers, tax IDs, SSN fragments, client identifiers, signatures, legal privileged text, or personal addresses. Use references to secure source systems instead of embedding sensitive content.
